Comfortable Living: Apartman Verona in Ilok offers a one-bedroom apartment with a living room. The ground-floor unit features a private entrance, garden views, and a patio.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, a kitchenette, washing machine, and a dining area. The apartment includes a sofa bed, TV, and a fully equipped kitchen with a refrigerator, oven, and stovetop.
Convenient Location: Located 55 km from Osijek Airport, the apartment is near Promenada Shopping Mall (44 km), SPENS Sports Centre (45 km), and the Museum of Vojvodina (46 km). Reception staff speak English and Croatian.
Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated for room cleanliness and comfort, Apartman Verona ensures a pleasant stay for all visitors.
